column7: Dr. Abhishek Savita’s research explores global climate dynamics using advanced numerical modeling and observational data. His work focuses on ocean heat and salt variability, oceanic transport, water-mass transformation, and large-scale circulation. He has extensive experience with CMIP-class coupled climate models and experiment design.

column7: My research is primarily focused on studying Transition Metal Oxides (TMOs).
